supersedes.reason: Revalidate Entroly 1.0.60 after exact recovery began preserving complete source lines and ranking the strongest evidence before applying the safe-fit budget. Preserve the immutable v2 protocol and result.

recovery_resilience.latency_policy: Report per-system p50 and p95 store/retrieve latency descriptively; correctness gates cannot be traded for speed.
recovery_resilience.development_policy: Development results may guide implementation and remain visible but cannot support a public leadership claim.
recovery_resilience.holdout_policy: Run once after the complete-line and relevance-before-fit repair. This revalidation can establish current implementation integrity but cannot convert a tie into a leadership claim.
